name: BrepSolidOrientation
summary: Enumerates all possible Solid Orientations for a Brep.

enum_values.name: Inward
enum_values.summary: Brep is a Solid with inward facing normals.

enum_values.name: Outward
enum_values.summary: Brep is a Solid with outward facing normals.

enum_values.name: Unknown
enum_values.summary: Breps is a Solid but no orientation could be computed.
